description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 28 hrs 15 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 4 mins. His tracked work was mostly in Java (48%), with additional time in Other (35%) and Markdown (16%). The activity data shows 5 tracked projects, but no public repository names or GitHub commits, PRs, or new repos were listed.
